spacing_and_layout.marketing_page: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetrical layouts. col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2 for hero elements. Generous vertical spacing (py-24 or py-32).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid. Dense. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-4 or gap-6. Functional beauty with 1px border-border.
spacing_and_layout.booking_page: Split storytelling layout. Left column: Sticky professional bio, photo, trust signals. Right column: Service selection, Calendar, Time slots.
spacing_and_layout.general_rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8). Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile.

components.buttons: Rounded-full for marketing, rounded-lg for dashboard/apps. Primary color Terracotta. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) and increased shadow.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (#E8DED1). NO muddy gray shadows. Avoid default Shadcn card look; customize to be flat and elegant.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components (Form, Input, Select). Customize to have warm borders. Focus ring must be primary (#C86B53). NO native HTML inputs.
components.navigation: Crystal Glass header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80. 1px delicate inner stroke. Never fully transparent over content.
components.charts_stats: Go cardless where possible. Highlight typography and data over boxes.

media_and_images.guidelines: Use close-ups. Max overlay opacity bg-black/40 (if dark text is needed, use white/40 overlay). No full flat blanket overlays that kill image contrast.

icons.style: Duotone or regular weight to match the premium, bespoke feel of the platform.

interactions_and_motion.rules: Smooth state changes. Entrance animations staggered for lists (e.g., booking slots). Use framer-motion for marketing transitions. MUST respect prefers-reduced-motion.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='signup-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install @phosphor-icons/react, framer-motion, and required Shadcn dependencies.
Configure Tailwind CSS to use the Warm Beige, Terracotta, and Dark Brown palette exactly as specified.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' fonts are imported and applied correctly in index.css or layout.
Build the Marketing page using custom HTML/Tailwind for artistic asymmetry (Tetris Grid).
Build the Dashboard and Auth pages using highly customized Shadcn components (Control Room Grid).
The Booking Page (/:slug) must feel like a premium, trustworthy checkout experience with a split layout.
Ensure all data-testid attributes are implemented across all interactable elements for testing.
